name: Tank Plant
notes: Fort Irongrad only — builds the full Heavy Tank roster in batches of 3-5, the most complete source of heavy armor (Winter Forge's Frostworks builds a partial, overlapping subset). Unlocks, in order: Juggernaut, Rocket Tank, Granite Crumbler, Chonky. Granite Crumbler and Chonky are Tank Plant-exclusive (not built at Frostworks); Juggernaut and Rocket Tank are shared between both buildings. Not fixed/pre-seeded — buildable fresh like any other Production building, same as every other Unique base's specialty producer.
